content:
Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption, "Who's looking forward to the snowy winter days in New York City? ☃️⛸️✨🌨️ Photos by @marzenka_. Tag your best travel photos with #travellingthroughtheworld", the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "New York City",
    "full_address": "New York, NY, USA",
    "image": "https://www.nycgo.com/images/cms/global/general-photos/2017/winter/wintertime-view-of-the-statue-of-liberty-new-york-city_1024x768.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "New York City",
    "full_address": "New York, NY, USA",
    "image": "https://www.nycgo.com/image/ny/45428/750/500/1/new-york-city-winter-skyline.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

I hope this is helpful!
